## LibraryRuntime.LibraryRuntimeContext.getRuntimeConfection() method

Gets a runtime confection by ID (with lazy resolution and caching).

**Signature:**

```typescript
getRuntimeConfection(id: ConfectionId): Result<AnyConfection>;
```
